pages.text: $(bold)Cooking is a whole system.$()$(br2)$(item)Farmer's Delight$() is the foundation — cutting boards, cooking pots, real recipes with real ingredients.$(br2)Expansions stack on: ocean food, end food, beach food, meadow food, wine, tea, coffee. Look up $(item)Cooking Pot$() in JEI to start.

$(bold)The Delights family.$()$(br2)$(item)Chef's Delight$() — adds a chef villager profession.$(br)$(item)Ocean's Delight$(), $(item)End's Delight$() — themed food chains.$(br)$(item)Crate Delight$() — decorative food storage.$(br2)Plus the Let's Do series: Vinery, HerbalBrews, Beachparty, Meadow, WilderNature.

$(bold)Automating it.$()$(br2)Create's food expansions plug straight into Farmer's Delight. $(item)Slice & Dice$() automates cutting boards. $(item)Central Kitchen$() runs whole kitchens. $(item)Integrated Farming$() handles the crops.$(br2)Hand-cook to learn the recipes. Then build the factory.

$(bold)Eat well.$()$(br2)$(item)AppleSkin$() shows hunger and saturation properly — food in this pack is generous, so there is no reason to eat raw potatoes.$(br2)$(item)Comforts$() adds sleeping bags and hammocks. Eat, sleep, get back out there.
